hooks.command: for i in python3 python py; do if "$i" -c "" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec "$i" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.codex/hooks/progress_hook.py" session_start --tool claude-code; fi; done
for i in python3 python py; do if "$i" -c "" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec "$i" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.codex/hooks/progress_hook.py" user_prompt_submit --tool claude-code; fi; done
for i in python3 python py; do if "$i" -c "" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec "$i" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/.codex/hooks/progress_hook.py" stop --tool claude-code; fi; done
for i in python3 python py; do if "$i" -c "" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec "$i" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/tools/save_log.py" --tool claude-code; fi; done
for i in python3 python py; do if "$i" -c "" </dev/null >/dev/null 2>&1; then exec "$i" "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/tools/save_log.py" --tool claude-code; fi; done
